name: onenote-mcp-server
description: MCP server providing tools to read and create Microsoft OneNote content via Microsoft Graph API.

tools.name: onenote-read
tools.description: Read content from Microsoft OneNote notebooks, sections, or pages

pageId.description: ID of the specific page to read

sectionId.description: ID of the section to list pages from

notebookId.description: ID of the notebook to list sections from

includeContent.description: Whether to include the content of the page

includeMetadata.description: Whether to include metadata about the page

tools.name: onenote-create
tools.description: Create new content in Microsoft OneNote

title.description: Title of the content to create

parentId.description: ID of the parent section or notebook

prompts.name: Get sections in a notebook
prompts.description: List all sections in a specific notebook

prompts.name: Get pages in a section
prompts.description: List all pages in a specific section

prompts.name: Get a specific page
prompts.description: Get content from a specific page

prompts.name: Create a section in a notebook
prompts.description: Create a new section in a specific notebook

prompts.name: Create a page in a section
prompts.description: Create a new page in a specific section

env.name: CLIENT_ID
env.description: Azure AD client ID for authentication
